### 2141125
**Care Bears: Unlock the Magic S01E16 - Festival of Hearts**  
🆕 TV-Y7 🔓 11:01  
⌛ April 15, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=10000000000&titleid=2141125&mediaid=e51aa25efe844c7acb40fa0bd0b852d394c552d0) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/care-bears-unlock-the-magic/festival-of-hearts-episode.html  
seriesid=`2141109` titleid=`2141125` mediaid=`e51aa25efe844c7acb40fa0bd0b852d394c552d0`  
_When two greedy gnomes steal Love-a-Lot's gift-making crystal heart, the Care Bears must get it back in time for the Festival of Hearts that they are holding for the Whiffles. In doing so, they have to teach the gnomes the meaning of caring._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2141125_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>

_Malcom becomes the new boss of Blusterland when he tricks Bluster into letting him transfer his inner-badness into a Bad Seed, leaving Bluster a polite shell of his former self.
